mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_inventory mi JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE 1=1
AND ( mi.material_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT mi.inventory_id, mi.material_id, mi.quantity, mi.lot_no AS lotNo, mi.expiration_date AS expirationDate, mi.received_date AS receivedDate, mi.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, mi.status, mi.inventory_status AS inventoryStatus, mi.last_updated AS lastUpdated, mi.last_movement_date AS lastMovementDate, mi.is_discarded AS isDiscarded, mi.discarded_date AS discardedDate, mi.discard_reason AS discardReason, m.material_name AS materialName, m.unit, m.safety_stock AS safetyStock, m.material_type AS materialType FROM material_inventory mi LEFT JOIN material m ON mi.material_id = m.material_id WHERE mi.material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY mi.expiration_date ASC
